case_title: MARIO DAVILA VS. LUIS ARMANDO SOSA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO OCT-03-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVILA, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, LUIS ARMANDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVILA, MARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOSA, LUIS ARMANDO $6,495.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO LUIS ARMADO SOSA 658 TURK STREET SF.CA.94115

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, LUIS ARMANDO HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-02-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $240 ON OCTOBER 11, 2013, THEN, $100--$150 PER MONTH STARTING BETWEEN NOVEMBER 1-10, 2013, AND CONTINUING DURING THAT PERIOD EACH UNTIL THE ENTIRE AMOUNT IS PAID", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2014 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-20-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-10-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. PER THE PLAINTIFF, THE DEFENDANT IS PAYING AS AGREED. CONTINUED TO JULY 10, 2014 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINU MATTER TO DECEMBER 11, 2014 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED JANUARY 2, 2014 IS WITHDRAWN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2015 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGESS REPORT TO SEP-10-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 5/18/15 IS WITHDRAWN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
